# README terminal demo

GitHub READMEs cannot play video tags reliably, so the animated terminal is a
**GIF** (generated by [VHS](https://github.com/charmbracelet/vhs) from a `.tape`
script). Alternatives like asciinema `.cast` files need an external player.

```bash
# from repo root
./docs/demo/record.sh
```

Requires `vhs`, `ffmpeg`, `ttyd`, and `nix` on `PATH`.
